commit.message:
feat: YouTube transcript extraction + feature bleed fixes

Transcript extraction:
- lib/youtube-transcript.ts — scrapes YouTube auto-captions (zero API cost)
- Enhanced parsers use description + transcript for richer data
- Extracts: who won the game, key tactical moments, spoken unit details
- Car setup extraction now catches spoken setup values from transcript
- Only runs on battle-report/race content or 15min+ videos (cost control)
- Winner badge on video detail page

Feature bleed fixes:
- "Build" tab hidden from SimPitStop nav
- /build page returns 404 on sim racing deployments
- "Setups" tab already hidden from TabletopWatch

Schema: has_transcript, winner, key_moments columns added.

commit.message:
PWA: manifest, service worker, ícone SVG, meta tags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fold distill_note into hone_spell via note_ids (breaking)

distill_note was a separate tool with an inconsistent name — the package
vocabulary is "hone", not "distill" at the tool surface. Distillation
happens *during* honing per the soul text, so it belongs inside hone_spell.

- hone_spell now accepts optional note_ids: number[]; after sealing, each
  note is marked distilled (distilled_by = first sealed path). Failures
  per-note are warnings, not errors — the seal already happened.
- distill_note tool and test deleted.
- distillNoteToolName removed from tool_names.
- tool_mapping: distill now maps to hone_spell.
- ToolWarningCode: added 'invalid_state' for per-note distill failures.
- Registry count: 12 → 11. README tools table updated.
- Docs: NOTES, DRAFTS, README updated to reflect merged flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix plant DB locale-aware filters and add life cycle section (#4)

* Fix plant DB locale-aware filters, add life cycle section, and audit filter translations

- Make dynamicOptionsCache locale-scoped with request deduplication via dynamicOptionsPending
- Prevent MoreFiltersPanel from closing when clicking the locale picker (data-preserve-overlays pattern)
- Reload sidebar lists on locale change via useSignalEffect
- Add life cycle multi-select chips to FilterStrip with i18n keys in all 11 locales
- Add life_cycle to activeFilterCount
- Fix useEffect with signal.value dep array → useSignalEffect in PlantDbPanel
- Comprehensive filter audit documented in docs/db/codex-review.md covering scientific
  meaningfulness, translation coverage, and case correctness for all 74 dynamic fields
- Update CLAUDE.md with renderer gate status, signal gotchas, and filter architecture docs
- Update docs/renderer/renderer.md with rulers.ts seam and scale bar migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add scientific value assessment to filter audit

Review every categorical field's values for botanical/ecological correctness.
Key findings: pollination_syndrome mixes hierarchy levels, seed_dormancy_type
conflates types/durations/unrelated traits, fruit_type has non-type values,
invasive_potential conflates biogeographic status with invasion risk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add translations for 11 categorical fields and composite value handler

- Add schema-contract.json translations for deciduous_evergreen, drought_tolerance,
  fertility_requirement, moisture_use, anaerobic_tolerance, fruit_seed_abundance,
  toxicity, invasive_potential, seed_dispersal_mechanism, reproductive_type, fruit_type
  (1050 total translation entries, up from 490)
- Add translate_composite_value() in lookup.rs that splits slash-separated values
  (e.g. "Blue/Purple"), translates each part individually, and rejoins
- Use composite translation in both filters.rs and detail.rs
- Update codex-review.md: mark Issues C, E, F, H as fixed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update CLAUDE.md with translation pipeline gotchas

Add learnings from filter translation work: case-sensitive contract keys
must match actual DB values (not enum values), dual-source translated_values
pipeline, and composite value translation pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: articles — pas de description OG, titre seul traduit et injecté

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add read.catalogueReadiness(db) to close the curate-readiness gap

Downstream callers were bandaiding "should I run catalogue?" with external
timestamps. The stamp already existed (catalogue() writes computed_at to
grimoire_health); the missing piece was a derived read that compares pending
notes and spell events against that timestamp.

Returns ready/reason/lastCatalogueAt/newNotesSince/newEventsSince — mirrors
the souls package's runMaintenance readiness pattern but grounded in grimoire's
own evidence model. Docs updated across README, HUMAN.md, and HEALTH.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Phase 5 specification: Interactive timeline for /now snapshots

Complete specification document for public snapshot display:
- Interactive timeline component with 5 visible nodes
- Center-focused navigation (click to select, arrows to shift)
- Positioned between main content and widgets
- URL parameter support (/now?date=20170801)
- Responsive design (desktop, tablet, mobile)
- Detailed implementation plan with 4 sub-phases
- CSS/styling guidelines matching hultberg.org aesthetic
- Accessibility and keyboard navigation support

Design goals:
- Subtle but accessible (doesn't dominate page)
- Personal reflection tool + public transparency
- Intuitive interaction model

Estimated effort: 8-12 hours total

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: 移除 process.env.DEBUG 引用以修复 TypeScript 错误

问题：process.env 需要 @types/node 依赖，增加不必要的类型依赖。

修复：直接移除调试日志条件，保持日志简洁。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand obs space to 102: add horse attributes and placement

Add 6 new features to the observation vector (96 → 102):
- forward_accel, turn_accel, cornering_grip, stamina_recovery:
  enables per-horse strategy adaptation (pacing, cornering aggression)
- placement_norm, num_horses_norm: direct placement visibility
  so the agent doesn't need to infer standing from relative positions

Bump obs_schema.json to v4. Modifier flags shift to indices 94-101.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implémente deux specs majeures pour l'oral DNB :

   PDF/PWA/dashboard.

   GroupeEvaluateScreen, créneaux adaptatifs.

et fix bug doublon nonAffectes pour groupes sans jury disponible.

commit.message:
docs: 添加技术亮点章节到 README

- 新增智能分层处理策略说明
- 详解 AST 大纲提取算法
- 介绍智能摘要引擎（日志/配置/文档/CSV分析器）
- 说明性能优化设计（并发读取、LRU缓存）
- 强调隐私优先特性（本地处理、敏感数据脱敏）
- 添加处理流程图

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase Meta warmup to every 4 hours with more API calls per run

Now hits ~40-60 calls per user per run (6x/day = 240-360 calls/day).
Added: daily breakdowns, multiple date presets, adset insights, adcreatives,
page feeds, up to 5 campaigns/ads per account, 5 accounts per user.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PATCH /session and GET /server/motd endpoints (#100)

* Add PATCH /session and GET /server/motd endpoints (#86)

Complete Phase 2 of the AONX REST API: session renewal heartbeat
with TTL-aware expiry timestamps, and server message-of-the-day
endpoint. Adds motd/TTL config accessors to NXServer to keep
plugin-layer endpoints decoupled from app-layer ServerSettings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add JSON schema validation with OpenAPI codegen pipeline

Introduce a JsonSchema validator (fluent builder API with dot-path
error messages) and a Python codegen script that generates C++ schema
definitions from doc/aonx/openapi.yaml at build time.

Pipeline: openapi.yaml -> generate_schemas.py -> AonxSchemas.cpp

Opt-in via -DAOSDL_GENERATE_SCHEMAS=ON (requires Python3 + PyYAML).
Without the flag, endpoints fall back to manual field checking.
SessionCreateEndpoint wired up as proof-of-concept.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix portability and thread safety review feedback

- Replace gmtime_r (POSIX-only) with C++20 chrono calendar types
  (year_month_day, hh_mm_ss) for portable ISO 8601 formatting
- Make session_ttl_seconds_ std::atomic<int> for safe reads from
  HTTP handler threads
- Document set-before-threads-start invariant on motd_

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make schema generation opt-out (default ON)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add schema generator tests with test YAML fixture

Test the codegen pipeline end-to-end: a test OpenAPI YAML exercises
required/optional fields, $ref resolution, arrays, enums, string maps,
unconstrained objects, and the YAML boolean trap ("on" key). Adds
--prefix flag to the generator to avoid symbol collisions when
multiple specs are compiled into the same binary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address review feedback: fail loudly, CI deps, lint nits, test fixture

- FATAL_ERROR when AOSDL_GENERATE_SCHEMAS=ON but Python/PyYAML missing
  (instead of silent WARNING that hides schema validation gaps)
- Add pip install pyyaml to CI workflow for all platforms
- Fix variable shadowing in generate_schemas.py (for name -> schema_name)
- Remove unused name variable in $ref resolution
- Extract NXEndpointTest fixture to eliminate ~20 lines of repeated
  setup/teardown boilerplate per endpoint test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix CI: use setup-python for consistent PyYAML, skip schemas for Flutter

CMake's find_package(Python3) was finding a different interpreter than
the system pip, so PyYAML installed to the wrong Python. Use
actions/setup-python@v5 with a pinned version so pip and CMake agree.

Skip schema generation entirely for AO_BUILD_FLUTTER builds — the
mobile client doesn't build server components (nx_net).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add minLength/maxLength/minimum/maximum support, warn on unsupported keywords

- JsonSchema now supports string length constraints (.min_length(),
  .max_length()) and integer range constraints (.minimum(), .maximum())
- Generator emits these from OpenAPI minLength/maxLength/minimum/maximum
- Generator prints stderr warnings for unsupported JSON Schema keywords
  (oneOf, pattern, const, etc.) so spec authors know constraints won't
  be enforced
- Add minLength: 1 to createSession fields (hdid, client_name,
  client_version) in the OpenAPI spec
- Remove #ifdef fallback in SessionCreateEndpoint — schema validation
  now handles empty-string rejection via minLength

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add stub schema validator for -DAOSDL_GENERATE_SCHEMAS=OFF builds

Two modes:
- ON (default): FATAL_ERROR if Python/PyYAML missing
- OFF (explicit opt-out): compiles with stub that logs ERROR on every
  validation call so operators know schemas are disabled

Also fix CI Python detection: pass Python3_ROOT_DIR from setup-python's
pythonLocation so CMake finds the same Python that has PyYAML.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix README: CMake FATAL_ERRORs, not warns, when deps missing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix CI Python detection: pass exact executable path to CMake

setup-python puts its Python on PATH but CMake's find_package(Python3)
can still find framework/system Python instead. Resolve the exact
sys.executable path from the setup-python interpreter and pass it via
-DPython3_EXECUTABLE so CMake uses the same Python that has PyYAML.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

seo: add /custom-dining-chair-cost page targeting dining chair keyword cluster

New page targeting "custom dining chairs", "dining chair cost", "walnut dining chairs",
"white oak dining chairs", and related queries. Combined TP ~40,000-60,000/mo at KD 0-5.
Natural companion to custom-dining-table-cost, farmhouse-table-cost, and custom-bench-cost.

Includes per-chair pricing table, full set pricing, species comparison, 4 style cards,
6 cost driver sections, 5-step pricing guide with worked example (white oak side chair:
$1,857 sale price single, ~$8,900 for a set of 6), FAQPage JSON-LD, HowTo JSON-LD,
and BreadcrumbList schema. Sitemap updated at priority 0.8.

feat: add home page PR review learnings — API, naming, grid, modals, auth

Pre-work: check openapi.json before creating API types/actions
Naming: semantic section names, never FirstSection/SecondSection
File location: page-specific → views/, reusable → components/
Grid: MUI Grid component, not CSS Grid in SCSS
Modals: valtio store for list items, render once at section level
Event handlers: named handlers, no inline arrow functions in JSX
Auth: getLoggedInUser does ONE thing, cookie maxAge = JWT expiry
API: read openapi.json, never invent fields or endpoints

commit.message:
chore: 移除 AI solver 冗余日志

问题：solveLevel 输出大量迭代日志（每 100 次迭代），导致测试输出难以阅读。

修复：
- 移除迭代日志，除非设置 DEBUG=solver 环境变量
- 移除初始状态、找到解、完成等调试日志
- 保留错误日志（如箱子数不匹配）

现在测试输出只显示每个关卡的求解进度和最终统计信息。

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Complete API server integration with real imager engine

Integrate RESTful API server with actual imaging operations, replacing simulation
with full-featured forensic disk imaging capabilities via HTTP API.

Features:
- Real imaging execution with all v2.1 features (multi-hash, compression, sparse, throttling)
- Support for multiple source types (disk, file, cloud storage)
- Support for multiple destination types (file, cloud storage)
- Real-time progress tracking via WebSocket streaming
- Writer stacking (format → sparse → compression → throttle)
- Complete authentication (API key + mTLS)
- Comprehensive error handling

API Endpoints:
- GET /api/v1/health - Health check
- GET /api/v1/version - Version information
- POST /api/v1/jobs/image - Create imaging job
- GET /api/v1/jobs/{id} - Get job status
- DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id} - Cancel job
- GET /api/v1/jobs - List jobs
- WS /api/v1/jobs/{id}/stream - Real-time progress

Testing:
- Successfully tested with 5MB file
- Multi-hash verification (MD5 + SHA256)
- Sparse file detection
- Job lifecycle management
- All endpoints validated

Documentation:
- docs/API_SERVER.md - Complete API reference (~950 lines)
- docs/API_INTEGRATION_SUMMARY.md - Integration summary
- Updated README.md with API server documentation

Files:
- pkg/api/imaging.go - Core integration logic (350 lines)
- pkg/storage/api_helpers.go - Cloud storage helpers
- pkg/api/jobs.go - Updated job execution
- docs/API_SERVER.md - API documentation
- docs/API_INTEGRATION_SUMMARY.md - Summary
